{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603240105181214BF3B59E46DC8EAF4"}"},"total":2289},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7378376414482088729","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看的后宫流，看起来还算挺舒服的，评分略低但不错，就是到后期的时候总是走剧情的感觉，修为描写也没那么好，但总归是不错的，完结的不能算仓促还行反正我挺喜欢的吧[偷笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1717913989,"group_id":"7258444449796066364","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个什么都爱看的读者","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyTrYumf5SztU0BPd12pELCijPLwYkboef+/sAZE1hnX","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/18d30f60a4804d2a8b4b35351dddab01~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776881093&x-signature=gWjAVh%2BvZ1hvidJ4tIGkAO9Au0U%3D","user_id":"2436135864504093","user_name":"终错付丨厌世"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2436135864504093","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1779358222,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"},{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7258444449796066364","book_info":{"abstract":"一梦醒来，已是换了人间。这里有神有鬼，有妖有怪。天界地府，四海龙宫，女鬼画皮，狐妖蛇精，有虎狼化妖嗜血狂暴，有草木成精向往爱情……
有狐妖感念恩德，以身相许。
有女鬼不甘寂寞，自荐枕席。
有龙女情深似海，不离不弃。
有仙女舍弃长生，不为成仙，只在红尘中等你……
且看周毅周子恒穿越诸天万界，练武修仙，浪迹红尘，逍遥长生……
计划穿越《仙剑系列》《蜀山传》《天之痕》《青蛇》《花千骨》《宝莲灯》《西游记后传》等等。
主世界：《聊斋》
已穿越世界：《射雕+神雕》《天龙八部》《不良人》《少年歌行》《雪中》《仙剑一》《青蛇》《花千骨》《蜀山传》《我和僵尸有个约会》《轩辕剑之天之痕》《仙剑四＋仙剑三》《八仙全传》《宝莲灯前传》《西游记后传》
